zh.Nether Stowey, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特瑟 斯度維
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletort於1086年之後出生在英國薩默塞特瑟 斯度維時，他的父親Hugh de Valletort8942歲，母親Mrs. Hugh de Valletort8941歲。他和Mrs. Richard de Valletort至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.Nether Stowey, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特瑟 斯度維
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletort于1086年之后出生在英国薩默塞特瑟 斯度維时，他的父亲Hugh de Valletort8942岁，母亲Mrs. Hugh de Valletort8941岁。他和Mrs. Richard de Valletort至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Nether
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of Näther, an occupational name for a stitcher or embroiderer, from an agent derivative of Middle High German næjen ‘to embroider, to sew’. Compare Nader .

nameMeanings.name: Stowey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Over or Nether Stowey, Stowey in Cutcombe, or Stowey near Bishop Sutton (all Somerset).

variants.name: Stoye
meanings: Probably for the most part a transferred use of the surname, which originally denoted someone who lived near a large boulder or outcrop. In other cases it may derive directly from the vocabulary word (Old English stān), and be chosen as representing qualities of strength and endurance.

variants.name: Stoy
meanings: Germanized or Americanized form of Sorbian and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Stoj, Polish and Rusyn (from Poland) Stój: from a short form of a Slavic personal name, such as Stojmir, based on the element (imperative) stoj ‘stand, stay’. Compare 2 below.
Rusyn: from Stoy, a short form of a personal name such as Stoymir (see 1 above).

English (Essex): variant of Stowey, a habitational name from Over or Nether Stowey, Stowey in Cutcombe, or Stowey near Bishop Sutton (all Somerset), named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + weg ‘way, path, road’.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletort was born after 1086, in Nether Stowey, Somerset, England, his father, Hugh de Valletort, was 8942 and his mother, Mrs. Hugh de Valletort, was 8941. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Richard de Valletort.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletort est né après 1086, à Nether Stowey, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Valletort, avait 8942 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Hugh de Valletort, avait 8941 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Richard de Valletort.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletort nach 1086 in Nether Stowey, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Valletort 8942 und seine Mutter Mrs. Hugh de Valletort 8941. Er hatte mit Mrs. Richard de Valletort mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletort è nato il dopo il 1086 nel Nether Stowey, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Valletort, aveva 8942 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Hugh de Valletort, aveva 8941 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Richard de Valletort.

ja.Nether Stowey, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトネスエル ストウエイ
ja.lifeSummary: Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletortが1086年以後にイギリスソメルセトネスエル ストウエイで生まれた時，父Hugh de Valletortは8942歳，母Mrs. Hugh de Valletortは8941歳であった。彼はMrs. Richard de Valletortとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletort(이)가 1086년 이후 영국 서머세트 네터 스타우이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Valletort(은)는 8942세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Hugh de Valletort(은)는 8941세였다. 그는 Mrs. Richard de Valletort(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

mn.Nether Stowey, Somerset, England: Nether Stowey, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletort nasceu após 1086, em Nether Stowey, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Valletort, tinha 8942 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Hugh de Valletort, tinha 8941 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Richard de Valletort.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletort родился после 1086 г. в местности нетир стоуи, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Valletort было 8942 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Hugh de Valletort, 8941. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Richard de Valletort.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard of Nether Stowey de Valletort nació después de 1086, en Nether Stowey, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Valletort, tenía 8942 años y su mamá, Mrs. Hugh de Valletort, tenía 8941 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Richard de Valletort.
